title: Long-press to reveal contextual actions inline
design_brief: Long-press a message bubble to reveal a row of reaction emojis above it (iMessage Tapback). Reference: iMessage reactions, Slack reactions on mobile.
mobile_reasoning: Long-press triggers a reaction popover that appears above the message via portal. Each reaction emoji has its own spring scale-in.
interaction_details: Long-press message → popover springs in with stagger
what_makes_this_native: 1) iMessage Tapback pattern. 2) Staggered springs. 3) Per-reaction haptic.

title: Sheet with stepper indicator at top
design_brief: A multi-step wizard inside a bottom sheet, with step indicator dots at top. Reference: payment flows, onboarding flows.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Indicator that doesn't reflect current state
mobile_reasoning: Stepper at top, content swap below. Sheet height stays constant (or animates between known heights per step).
interaction_details: Top indicator visible at all times
what_makes_this_native: 1) Dot indicator pattern. 2) Persistent context.

title: FlashList with item swipe-to-delete that animates collapse
design_brief: Swipe a row, tap delete, row collapses smoothly. Reference: iOS Mail delete, Things 3 trash.
mobile_reasoning: Local state removes the id; row's exiting layout animation collapses height + slides. Optionally show 'undo' toast for 5s.
interaction_details: Tap delete → row exits with fade-left + layout collapse
what_makes_this_native: 1) Reanimated layout exit. 2) Sandbox 5s undo window. 3) Smooth list reflow.

title: Page transition: stack reveal with parallax
design_brief: Custom screen transition: pushing screen slides up 60% while previous screen slides up only 20% (parallax). Reference: Apple Music album-to-track, some games.
mobile_reasoning: Expo Router exposes screenOptions with custom cardStyleInterpolator (in v3 via @react-navigation/native-stack). Define interpolator using progress.
interaction_details: Push: detail slides up 60% of screen
Previous screen translates up 20% creating parallax
what_makes_this_native: 1) Native stack interpolators. 2) GPU-accelerated transitions.

title: Animated wave fill (water level meter)
design_brief: A water bottle or hydration tracker showing current level as an animated sine wave. Reference: water-tracking apps.
mobile_reasoning: Skia path drawn as a sine wave at level Y, animated phase. Below the wave is filled, above is transparent.
what_makes_this_native: 1) GPU path. 2) Worklet phase advance.

title: Rich text editor toolbar (bold, italic, list)
design_brief: A rich text editor where toolbar floats above keyboard. Buttons toggle current cursor formatting. Reference: Notion mobile, Bear, Day One.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-keyboard-controller for keyboard height. Toolbar absolutely positioned at keyboard top. Active formatting state from RichEditor's selection.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Keyboard-tracking toolbar. 2) Per-state visual feedback.

title: Tab bar that morphs into a floating action bar on scroll
design_brief: Bottom tab bar slides up and shrinks into a compact pill (just FAB) when user scrolls. Reference: emerging Material 3 patterns.
mobile_reasoning: Tab bar width and content opacity interpolate from scroll direction. When scrolling down, bar shrinks to 64px pill with just the center FAB visible.
interaction_details: Scroll down → tab bar shrinks to pill
accessibility_considerations: Hidden tabs still focusable via standard nav.
performance_notes: Single derived value drives all changes.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Scroll-driven morph. 2) Maintains nav access. 3) UI-thread.

title: Background blur on image (vibrancy backdrop pattern)
design_brief: A music player or photo detail where the same image is blurred behind the foreground image, creating vibrancy. Reference: Apple Music Now Playing.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: BlurView on Android with high intensity
mobile_reasoning: Same image rendered twice: foreground sharp + background with BlurView. On iOS, BlurView is native. On Android, optionally pre-blur via Skia ImageFilter.
performance_notes: iOS native blur. Android Image.blurRadius works for static.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Native iOS blur. 2) Per-platform appropriate fallback. 3) Vibrancy is the Apple HIG pattern.

title: Map dark mode style
design_brief: Map switches to dark style at night or matches system. Reference: Apple Maps, Google Maps dark.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Always light map regardless of theme
Custom style JSON without testing readability
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps customMapStyle prop for Google Maps. Apple Maps automatically follows system theme on iOS 13+.

stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: Apple Maps auto-dark; Google Maps needs custom style.

interaction_details: Dark theme: dark style on Android, native dark Apple Maps on iOS
what_makes_this_native: 1) Apple Maps native theme. 2) Google Maps style JSON for parity.

title: Stacked bar chart with animated build-up
design_brief: Show category breakdown over time as stacked bars. Each bar's segments stack and animate in. Reference: Stripe revenue, expense trackers.
mobile_reasoning: Skia rects per segment per bar. Heights animate in with stagger.
what_makes_this_native: 1) GPU rendering. 2) Worklet-driven growth.

title: Native picker on iOS (UIPickerView) and Material spinner on Android
design_brief: Single-selection picker: iOS uses native UIPickerView via bottom sheet, Android uses Material dropdown.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Modal full-screen for what should be inline
mobile_reasoning: @react-native-picker/picker provides per-platform native. iOS shows wheel; Android shows dropdown.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Native picker per platform. 2) System a11y inherited.

title: Voice control alternative navigation
design_brief: All interactive elements named clearly enough for iOS Voice Control / Android Voice Access to navigate. Reference: Apple Voice Control guidelines.
mobile_reasoning: Every Pressable needs accessibilityLabel. Icon buttons especially.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Voice Control is a system feature. 2) Labels are the contract.

title: Reduce JS thread work via worklet-only animations
design_brief: Audit pattern: prefer worklet animations. Wherever JS state drives animation, move to shared values.
mobile_reasoning: Anything that animates must use shared values. JS-driven animations cause bridge thrash and frame drops.
interaction_details: Animation runs on UI thread regardless of JS load
what_makes_this_native: 1) UI thread = native priority. 2) JS-free animation.

title: Terminal aesthetic: monospace, blinking cursor, command palette
design_brief: A developer tool aesthetic: black background, monospace cyan text, blinking cursor. Reference: Termius, Working Copy, Blink Shell.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Bright colors that fight the terminal feel
mobile_reasoning: Custom monospace font + blinking cursor via Reanimated opacity loop.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Custom mono. 2) Worklet cursor.

title: Tab switch with sliding underline indicator that morphs width
design_brief: Tab labels of varying widths; indicator slides AND morphs width to match new tab. Reference: iOS Notes folders.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Indicator that doesn't track label width
mobile_reasoning: Measure each tab's layout once. Indicator x and width interpolate based on active index.
animation_strategy: Shared values for x and width.
interaction_details: Indicator slides and morphs to new tab width
what_makes_this_native: 1) Width-aware indicator. 2) Spring physics.

title: Star rating input with drag-to-set
design_brief: Tap or drag across 5 stars to rate. Stars fill proportionally as finger moves. Reference: App Store review prompt, Yelp.
mobile_reasoning: Pan gesture maps x position to star count. Per-star scale spring when crossed.
interaction_details: Tap a star: sets to that number
what_makes_this_native: 1) Direct touch input. 2) Drag-to-rate is mobile-native.

title: GIF rendering inline
design_brief: Render animated GIFs in a chat or feed. Reference: iMessage GIFs, Reddit GIFs.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Static thumbnail in place of GIF
mobile_reasoning: expo-image supports animated GIFs natively. Tap to play/pause via prop. Cache via memory-disk.
what_makes_this_native: 1) expo-image's animated support. 2) Hardware-accelerated decode.

title: Compass overlay on map
design_brief: A small compass that points North as the user rotates the map. Reference: Apple Maps compass.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Compass tied to device orientation (wrong: should track map rotation)
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps fires onRegionChange with bearing on Android, available via camera on iOS. Use heading from camera to rotate compass.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Map-native heading. 2) Tactile feedback.

title: Heatmap calendar (contribution graph)
design_brief: GitHub-style contribution graph: 7 rows × 52 weeks of cells, color intensity based on count. Reference: GitHub mobile profile.
mobile_reasoning: Skia draws all cells in one canvas. Tap maps coordinates to date.
what_makes_this_native: 1) GPU per cell. 2) Touch hit-testing on canvas.

title: Modal stack from deeply nested screen
design_brief: Open a modal from a 3-screens-deep nested stack without popping. Modal is independent. Reference: any settings flow that triggers a help modal.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: router.push to a modal route (doesn't work)
mobile_reasoning: Expo Router supports modal screens at the root layout. They overlay the entire app regardless of nested stack.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Independent modal stack via Expo Router. 2) Native presentation.

title: Drag handle on side of row to drag-reorder (without long-press)
design_brief: A draggable list where each row has an explicit drag handle (three lines icon). Drag from handle to reorder. Reference: Things 3 reorder, Notion mobile list.
mobile_reasoning: Drag handle is its own GestureDetector with Pan. Touching the handle immediately enters drag mode (no long-press wait).
accessibility_considerations: Handle accessibilityRole='button' accessibilityActions for move up/down.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Explicit affordance. 2) No long-press latency.

title: Bottom sheet that hosts a video player
design_brief: Tap a video thumbnail → bottom sheet expands with video playing. Drag down to minimize to corner picture-in-picture style.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Modal full-screen for what should be PIP
mobile_reasoning: Sheet with custom snap points (mini, half, full). Video continues playing at all snaps.
interaction_details: Snap points: mini (corner thumbnail), half, full
what_makes_this_native: 1) PIP-like multi-snap. 2) Video survives layout changes.

title: Recently viewed list capped at N with LRU eviction
design_brief: A 'Recently viewed' chip strip at top of search. Capped at 10 items; oldest evicted as new ones added. Persists to MMKV.
mobile_reasoning: MMKV for storage. Insert at head, dedupe, cap at 10.
what_makes_this_native: 1) MMKV is RN-native (faster than AsyncStorage). 2) Bounded list.

title: Inline edit-in-place text field
design_brief: A label that becomes editable on tap. Reference: iOS Notes title, Notion inline titles.
mobile_reasoning: Conditional render: Text vs TextInput. Auto-focus on tap. Commit on blur or enter.
interaction_details: Escape would revert (handle via keyboard event)
what_makes_this_native: 1) Notion mobile feel. 2) Touch-edit pattern.

title: Achievement unlock burst (badge + particles)
design_brief: Earning a badge: badge zooms in with rotation flourish + particle burst + sound. Reference: Duolingo unlocks, Strava PR.
mobile_reasoning: Reuse confetti from rn-037. Badge entrance: scale 0 → 1.2 → 1 with rotation 0 → 360. Heavy haptic + Audio play.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Coordinated multi-channel feedback. 2) Confetti via Skia.

title: Animated SVG-like icon morph (hamburger to X)
design_brief: Hamburger menu icon morphs to X when menu opens. Reference: most apps with side menus.
mobile_reasoning: Skia draws three lines. Animated rotation + translation transforms them into an X.
interaction_details: Smooth morph between hamburger and X
what_makes_this_native: 1) Worklet morph. 2) Single Canvas.

title: Image upload progress with retry
design_brief: Uploading a photo shows progress bar overlaid on thumbnail. On failure, shows retry button. Reference: Instagram upload, Slack file upload.
mobile_reasoning: Upload progress via expo-file-system uploadAsync with onProgress. Display progress overlay; on error, show retry inline.
what_makes_this_native: 1) expo-file-system native upload. 2) Inline retry.

title: Wireframe / sketch aesthetic for prototypes
design_brief: A 'wireframe mode' for prototyping screens: hand-drawn-looking borders, sketchy fills. Reference: Figma sketch wireframes, early-stage prototyping.
mobile_reasoning: Skia paths with slight jitter on stroke. Fill with diagonal hatching pattern.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Skia paths with deliberate imperfection.

title: Bridge call batching for heavy native modules
design_brief: Pattern for reducing bridge calls when interacting with native modules (e.g., MMKV, file system). Batch multiple reads in one call.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: 100 individual MMKV.get calls in a loop
mobile_reasoning: MMKV is synchronous but each call crosses bridge. For many reads, batch via Promise.all on async wrappers or use bulk APIs.
interaction_details: Batch read N keys in one helper call
what_makes_this_native: 1) MMKV synchronous JSI binding. 2) Bulk helpers reduce call sites.

title: App icon badge count
design_brief: Set the unread count on the app icon. iOS: via expo-notifications setBadgeCountAsync. Android: not natively supported by all launchers.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Trying to enforce identical Android badge
mobile_reasoning: iOS supports natively. Android launcher support varies (Samsung, Pixel different).
what_makes_this_native: 1) Platform-aware. 2) System notification integration.
